channel.title: 最新限免 / 促销应用
channel.description: GoFans：最新限免 / 促销应用 - Made with love by RSSHub(https://github.com/DIYgod/RSSHub)

item.title: 「降价」-「iOS」apeDelay
item.description:
原价：¥38.00 -> 现价：¥22.00
平台：iOS
apeDelay - spectral Delay implements up to 2048 delay lines with feedback or up to 2048 Brick-wall filters. The algorithm is based on the STFT (i.e. Short Time Fourier Transform) analysis/re-synthesis. The audio signal is converted in abstract ‘Frequency Domain’, where is manipulated and transformed

item.title: 「降价」-「iOS」apeFilter
item.description:
原价：¥38.00 -> 现价：¥22.00
平台：iOS
apeFilter is a sophisticated Equaliser, the DSP is based on the Biquad/Cascade filters, very fast! The graphical interaction provides a great tool to design an extremely precise and smooth frequency response by directly manipulating up to 36 Peaks Filters. The Spectral Grid compilers increase the co

item.title: 「降价」-「iOS」Sparkle - Cross-Synthesis
item.description:
原价：¥58.00 -> 现价：¥28.00
平台：iOS
Sparkle is a tool for advanced spectral hybridizations made of several algorithms that operate on frequency domain. By means of envelope preservation and phase-sync processing it can creates high-quality sound transformations. The basic idea is to transfer the temporal structure of a sound (source)

item.title: 「降价」-「iOS」iVCS3
item.description:
原价：¥98.00 -> 现价：¥58.00
平台：iOS
iVCS3 Official EMS VCS3 emulator The VCS3 was created in 1969 by Peter Zinovieff's EMS company. The electronics were largely designed by David Cockerell and the machine's distinctive visual appearance was the work of electronic composer Tristram Cary. The VCS3 was more or less the first portable co

item.description:
原价：¥58.00 -> 现价：¥28.00
平台：iOS
Stria is rated as a Killer App by Apps4iDevices. item.title: 「降价」-「iOS」iPulsaret
item.description:
原价：¥58.00 -> 现价：¥28.00
平台：iOS
iPulsaret is rated as a Killer App by Apps4iDevices. iPulsaret is a new real-time software capable of all time-domain varieties of granular synthesis. A genuine granular playground able to generate a wide range of usual and not so usual effects: Grainlet, Trainlet, FM, time/pitch shifting, time/pit

item.title: 「降价」-「iOS」iDensity

item.title: 「降价」-「iOS」apeMatrix
item.description:
原价：¥88.00 -> 现价：¥38.00
平台：iOS
Holding true to the standard of apeSoft, apeMatrix continues to push the limits of possibilities in music creation. Automating almost every aspect of linked control, apeMatrix brings all your creation tools together and links them both in MIDI and audio. Letting you inject all your favorite FX both

item.title: 「降价」-「iOS」mood
item.description:
原价：¥78.00 -> 现价：¥38.00
平台：iOS
mood - A personal interpretation of the legendary Analog Synthesizer by Eugenio Giordani Jordan Rudess says: The Mood synth has immense sonic ability. It has captivated my imagination and sense of discovery.  In usual apeSoft form, it also has all the features that one expects in a top notch IOS in

item.title: 「免费」-「iOS」Luca - Photo Editor & Filters
item.description:
原价：¥8.00 -> 现价：¥0.00
平台：iOS
Luca is the perfect app for photo editing. Editing photos has never been easier! You will be able to turn your regular photo into a pro-level photo just within a couple of taps. Unfold what your pics can look like and share them on social media, like Instagram, Twitter, Facebook, Pinterest, Snapchat

item.title: 「降价」-「iOS」白平衡AI - KEV
item.description:
原价：¥28.00 -> 现价：¥22.00
平台：iOS
KEV是排名第一的最佳白平衡APP。 KEV APP可以把你的iPhone和iPad变成专业易用的光度计。KEV APP使用简单，只需利用内置的相机，无需额外配置传感器。 KEV使用AI分析实时场景预览并提供准确的白平衡数据，符合其极简主义设计理念，是摄影师和视频制作人的有力工具。 有时候，要在数码单反相机上取得完美的白平衡真的很让人头大。KEV能帮助你，告知你正确的白平衡数值。即使没有上千元的专业设备，你也可以量度光源的开尔文色温。 KEV是根据Sekonic的C-700R-U SpectroMaster色度计来进行校准， 我们保证准确度良好，甚至接近100%。你只需打开KEV APP

item.title: 「降价」-「iOS」Copy 'Em (Clipboard Manager)
item.description:
原价：¥98.00 -> 现价：¥58.00
平台：macOS
Copy 'Em is a fast and powerful clipboard manager for turbocharging your daily workflow. It automatically saves your history of copied text, images, links, files, color codes, and screenshots, etc., and lets you recall/paste them anytime, right at your fingertips. Use it to copy and paste items in b

Did you forget to take your reading glasses or need a magnifying glass to read small text ? Just pick your iPhone to transform it instantly into a magnifying glass with flash light, that comes in Full screen with light and NO wasted screen space. The Magnifier Flash App is a very convenient and h

item.title: 「免费」-「iOS」Orderly - Simple to-do lists

平台：iOS
It is a nice and incredibly easy to use to-do list app, that features a breath-taking interface, seamless cloud sync, and comes with "Location Based Reminders", so that the users never miss a to-do task at a particular location. With the unique visual layout, you can get a glimpse of your to-do list

It can help you maintain the original layouts, hyperlinks, colors, graphics, etc.. After the conversion, you’ll see the output Keynot

item.title: 「免费」-「iOS」Starlight® - Explore the Stars
item.description:
原价：¥22.00 -> 现价：¥0.00
平台：iOS
Point your iPhone or iPad like a magic lens into the night sky, and see in real time what stars, planets, and constellations hover above. Stargazing has never been so easy! This app is a streamlined starmap that is gorgeous to look at. See constellations come to life against a vibrant backdrop of

item.title: 「免费」-「iOS」Juice Watch
item.description:
原价：¥48.00 -> 现价：¥0.00
平台：iOS
从手腕上监控你的iPhone电池电量。 Juice Watch 是一个简单的应用程序，旨在做好两件事： •在Apple Watch上显示配对iPhone的电池电量 •当你的 Apple Watch 正在充电，电量超过 90 %（或者你选择的任何范围，从 50 %到 100 %）时，在你的iPhone 上发送通知提醒 只需要看一眼你的手腕，就可以全天监控iPhone的电量情况。或者，当你的iPhone在另一个房间充电时，你可以密切关注它的电池电量。 你可以同时看到iPhone和Apple Watch的电池电量。 当配对的iPhone正在充电，并且电量至少达到 80 %（或者你选择的任

item.title: 「免费」-「iOS」我的足迹: GPS 记录仪
item.description:
原价：¥15.00 -> 现价：¥0.00
平台：iOS
MyTracks是一款通过使用GPS数据来记录您的位置的应用程序。它非常适合徒步旅行、慢跑、散步、骑行等各种活动。这款应用程序利用先进的技术提供精确的测量和计算。 以下是您可以使用MyTracks做的事情： 记录您的路线：无论您是徒步旅行、慢跑还是骑行，MyTracks都可以记录您的路径并在地图上显示。 保存收藏的位置：如果有特定的地点您想要记住，您可以将它们标记为应用程序中的收藏夹。 导入和导出数据：MyTracks允许您以多种格式导入和导出数据，如CSV、GPX、KML和KMZ。 提高准确性：您可以进行静态GPS观测，以获得更准确的路标。 轻松导航：该应用程序在指南针上提供路标

item.title: 「降价」-「iOS」SkySafari 6 Pro
item.description:
原价：¥148.00 -> 现价：¥88.00
平台：macOS
SkySafari 6 Pro will revolutionize your astronomical viewing experience. It has the largest database of any astronomy app, includes every solar system object ever discovered, offers unparalleled accuracy, flawless telescope control, and provides the very best experience under the stars when you dep
